name: openclaw-security-judge-distillation
description: Template for PAI Model Gallery black-box distillation of the OpenClaw security judge.

distillation.teacher_model: [TODO: choose a supported teacher model, e.g. Qwen3-32B]
distillation.student_model: [TODO: choose a smaller Qwen-family student model, e.g. Qwen3-4B]

dataset_format.notes: PAI distillation input should keep instruction-only rows. Use the companion labeled file for local evaluation or QA.

recommendations: Keep each run in a separate OSS output directory.
Prefer a Qwen-family teacher and a smaller Qwen-family student.
Start with a 7B-class student if you want a local deployment target.
